introduction.title: Reliable, customer-focused property management
introduction.paragraph1: We provide comprehensive property management services covering administration, finances, and technical maintenance. Our work is built on planning, transparency, and smooth customer service.
introduction.paragraph2: Since 2009, we have served both small and large properties with strong expertise and local knowledge. Our goal is to preserve property value and ensure safe, comfortable living.
introduction.cta: Request a quote for property management

partners.title: We work with local partners
partners.paragraph1: Our established network includes professional help for all property maintenance, construction, and renovation work. Our partners commit to the same quality promise as we do, so even large renovations are completed to a high standard.

forms.title: Easy service with online forms
forms.paragraph1: You can find all our most important forms in one place. Whether you're submitting a move notice, ordering a property manager’s certificate, or reporting an issue, our online service is available around the clock.
forms.paragraph2: With online forms, your request goes directly to our specialist for processing without unnecessary middlemen. You can find all property-management-related forms here.

CTA-Responsibility-Section.title: Who's responsible and who is fixing it?
CTA-Responsibility-Section.paragraph1: When is the responsibility for repairs the housing company and when the shareholder? Our clear responsibility distribution table will help you understand the boundaries of maintenance responsibility, both indoors and in structures.

FAQ-Section.title: Frequently asked questions
FAQ-Section.paragraph1: We have gathered helpful guidance and practical tips for living in a housing company.

items.heading: How do I submit a fault report?
items.body: You can submit a fault report with the online form at any time. The report is sent directly to the right specialist for processing.

items.heading: Where can I find the housing company forms?
items.body: You can find all key property-management forms in one place on our website, and they are available 24/7.

items.heading: When do I need an alteration and repair notice?
items.body: If you plan apartment changes that may affect structures or systems maintained by the housing company, submit the notice before starting the work.

items.heading: Current updates on housing company energy renovations
items.body: The latest article from Isännöintiliitto explains how a housing company can plan an energy renovation step by step and avoid the most common pitfalls.

banner.heading: Request a quote for property management

intro.heading: Contact us
intro.paragraph1: Tell us briefly about your housing company's needs using the form provided. We will carefully review your situation and get back to you as soon as possible with a quote and next steps.
intro.paragraph2: If needed, we can also arrange a more detailed discussion where we go through the property management solution that best fits you. You don't have to include everything about the housing company, and the information you submit through the form can be supplemented later!

contactSection.heading: Your contact details for the quote request

propertySection.heading: Housing company details
propertySection.additionalInfoLabel: Other important details about the housing company:

form.submittedMessage: Form submitted! We will contact you as soon as possible.

Introduction-Section.title: Instructions for residents
Introduction-Section.paragraph1: A collection of instructions and tips for living smoothly in housing associations.
Introduction-Section.paragraph2: Note: housing associations may have exceptions in their articles of association or bylaws.

Prefix-Section.title: Clarity for maintenance
Prefix-Section.paragraph1: Who is responsible for repairing the faucet or maintaining the balcony? A clear division of responsibilities is the basis for smooth living and management of the housing association. Below you will find a detailed division of responsibilities table that helps you understand which maintenance tasks belong to the housing association and which are the responsibility of the shareholder.
Prefix-Section.paragraph2: This guide is based on current legislation and general industry practices, and its aim is to prevent ambiguities in repair and maintenance situations. Read the table and you will know what to do in the event of a fault or when planning a renovation.

Prefix-Section.title: Electronic forms in one place
Prefix-Section.paragraph1: Welcome to AR Isännöinni's electronic service. We have compiled all the key forms on this page, which will help you easily handle housing company-related notifications and orders online, exactly when it suits you best.

bullet-point-list.paragraph1: You can fill out and send the following forms through us, among others:
bullet-point-list.bullet-point-paragraph1: Notification of move and house registry extract: Report a move or order an official extract from the housing company's information.
bullet-point-list.bullet-point-paragraph2: Fault report and consumption readings: Report a fault you have noticed to the housing company or report the meter readings for your apartment.
bullet-point-list.bullet-point-paragraph3: Renovations and alterations: Apply for a permit for alterations or fill out a waterproofing work form before starting the renovation.
bullet-point-list.bullet-point-paragraph4: Property management certificate and requests for quotations: Order the necessary documents for a home purchase or request a quotation for our property management services.

Prefix-Section.paragraph2: Select the form you need below and fill in the requested information. After submitting the form, it will be forwarded directly to our property management office for processing.

Introduction-Section.title: Offer transactions
Introduction-Section.paragraph1: A modern and transparent way to conduct real estate deals.

Prefix-Section.title: What are offer transactions
Prefix-Section.paragraph1: Bidding is a popular way to buy and sell homes, as it is based on transparency and real market demand. Unlike traditional sales methods, where the price is a fixed asking price, in Bidding the price is determined based on publicly submitted bids in the market.
Prefix-Section.paragraph2: In the auction model, a starting price is set for the apartment, from which bids begin. Bids are made from this price upwards. The biggest difference to a traditional sale is transparency: all bids made are publicly visible on the apartment's sales page.
Prefix-Section.paragraph3: This removes the fear of blind bidding for buyers, as you always know what others are willing to pay. For sellers, the model ensures that they get the best possible market price for the property.

Bidding-Explained.title: How the Bidding Process Works
Bidding-Explained.paragraph1: Bidding is a process that progresses through clear stages. Our agent is there to support both the seller and the buyer at every step of the way.
Bidding-Explained.paragraph2: Interested buyers can sign up as followers of the property. This is an easy way to stay up to date: you will automatically receive an email notification whenever a new bid is placed. The number of followers is displayed publicly, providing a direct indication of the property's appeal.

bullet-point-list.paragraph1: Once you have found your dream home, you make a written offer through the agent. The offer specifies:
bullet-point-list.bullet-point-paragraph2: Payment terms and the completion date
bullet-point-list.bullet-point-paragraph3: Any conditions (e.g., securing a loan or the sale of your own home)

Bidding-Explained.paragraph3: Please note: In a bidding process, an offer must be valid for at least 48 hours. This ensures a period of consideration for all parties and prevents rushed decisions.
Bidding-Explained.paragraph4: The agent presents all offers to the seller. The seller can accept an offer no sooner than when it has been valid for 44 hours. The seller has full authority to choose which offer to accept—price is not the only deciding factor, as terms and schedules also carry weight. The seller also reserves the right to reject all offers if the target price is not met.

list-item1.paragraph: A low starting price attracts more viewers to the presentations.

list-item2.paragraph: The competitive situation often drives the price to the top of the market.

list-item3.paragraph: The seller always decides on the terms and conditions of the transaction.

list-item1.paragraph: You know exactly what others have offered.

list-item2.paragraph: Everyone has an equal opportunity to respond to new offers.

list-item3.paragraph: The 48-hour rule prevents auction fever and pressure

Prefix.title: What is the role of a public notary for real estate?
Prefix.paragraph1: A public notary (kaupanvahvistaja) is an individual authorized by the authority (National Land Survey of Finland) whose presence is a statutory requirement in real estate transactions (Code of Real Estate).

bullet-point-list.paragraph1: The core duties of a notary are:
bullet-point-list.bullet-point-paragraph1: Verification of identity: Ensuring the seller has the right to transfer the property and the buyer is who they claim to be.
bullet-point-list.bullet-point-paragraph2: Legal validity: Confirming that the deed of sale is formally correct and compliant.
bullet-point-list.bullet-point-paragraph3: Attestation: The transaction becomes binding only once both parties sign the agreements in the presence of the notary.
bullet-point-list.bullet-point-paragraph4: Reporting obligation: The notary ensures information is forwarded to the authorities (such as the National Land Survey), which initiates the buyer's title registration process.

Real-Estate-Specifications.title: What is considered a property?

bullet-point-list.paragraph1: In Finnish legislation, a property (kiinteistö) is an independent unit of land ownership. It can be:
bullet-point-list.bullet-point-paragraph2: A building site or a plot
bullet-point-list.bullet-point-paragraph3: Buildings located on the land area (such as a residential house or a summer cottage)

Real-Estate-Specifications.paragraph1: It is important to understand that legally, a house alone is not a property; a property always includes the land area (or part of it) on which the building is located.

When-to-acquire-cards.title: When is a public notary needed?

bullet-point-list.bullet-point-paragraph1: Selling a detached house or a plot of land

Not-Needed-Card.title: Not needed

bullet-point-list.bullet-point-paragraph1: Apartments in apartment buildings or terraced houses (Housing shares)
bullet-point-list.bullet-point-paragraph2: Buildings located on leased plots (Movable property)

Not-Needed-Card.note-paragraph: Note: If the transaction is conducted electronically through the National Land Survey of Finland's system, the system handles the verification automatically. In traditional meetings and with paper deeds, a public notary is essential. The most common rule of thumb is: if the object of the sale is a land area, you need a public notary.

Deed-Of-Transfer-CTA.title: Secure your transaction – order the drafting of the deed of sale as well
Deed-Of-Transfer-CTA.paragraph1: The public notary checks the formalities of the agreement, but they do not take a position on the terms of the sale or matters regulating the protection of the parties. Therefore, we always recommend that the deed of sale is drafted by a professional.

bullet-point-list.bullet-point-paragraph1: Draft legally sound deeds of sale.
bullet-point-list.bullet-point-paragraph2: Check certificates of mortgages and encumbrances and property register extracts.
bullet-point-list.bullet-point-paragraph3: Ensure that all necessary attachments are in order.

Deed-Of-Transfer-CTA.paragraph2: Contact us to book an appointment for a public notary service or request a quote for drafting a deed of sale. We operate flexibly and with expertise.
Deed-Of-Transfer-CTA.CTA-Button: Contact us regarding public notary services

banner.heading: Request a quote for your property

Prefix-Section.title: Sales Commission – Professionalism and Care
Prefix-Section.paragraph1: Are you planning to sell an apartment or a property? At AR Isännöinti, we handle your real estate transaction from start to finish with uncompromising professionalism and local expertise.
Prefix-Section.paragraph2: We offer a completely free appraisal visit, during which we familiarize ourselves with your property and provide an honest estimate of its market value. We schedule meetings flexibly on weekdays according to your schedule.

Services-Explained.title: What does the brokerage fee include?

bullet-point-list-1.paragraph1: Our brokerage fee is competitive and includes everything needed for a successful sale:

list-item1.paragraph: 3.1% of the debt-free price of the property (2.5% + VAT 25%).

bullet-point-list-2.paragraph1: We take care of everything on your behalf, so you can focus on finding a new home or moving:

list-item1.paragraph: Property valuation and the acquisition of all necessary official documents.

list-item2.paragraph: High-quality photography, creation of an attractive sales brochure, and broad visibility on Etuovi.fi and our website.

list-item3.paragraph: Newspaper advertising in connection with viewings according to a separate agreement.

list-item4.paragraph: Drafting of offer documents, professional offer negotiations, and preparation of deeds of sale.

list-item5.paragraph: Personal advice on all questions related to selling your home and buying a new one.

Form-Introduction.title: Leave a contact request
Form-Introduction.paragraph: Fill out the form below and we will get back to you as soon as possible. Let’s discuss how we can get the best price for your property!

Banner.title: Find your new home from us

Card-Section.title: Selkeä välityspalkkio - kattava palkkio

card1.title: Kohteen markkinointi
card1.paragraph: Asuntosi tulee näkymään tuhansille katsojille laadukkaalla ja tehokkaalla markkinoinnilla myötä. AR Isännöinnin markkinointi tavoittaa oikeat ostajat ja nopeuttaa myyntiä.

card2.title: Asunnon hinta-arvio ja myynnin valmistelu
card2.paragraph: Myynti alkaa realistisesta hinta-arviosta ja huolellisesta valmistelusta. Hankimme kaikki tarvittavat asiakirjat ja suunnittelemme myynnin niin, että kohde saadaan markkinoille tehokkaasti.

card3.title: Tarjoukset ja kaupanteko
card3.paragraph: Huolehdimme koko kaupantekoprosessista turvallisesti ja ammattitaitoisesti aina tarjouksista lopulliseen kauppakirjaan asti.

Card-Section.pricing-paragraph: AR Isännöinti tarjoaa kiinteistönvälitystä selkeällä ja kilpailukykyisellä palkkiolla. Välityspalkkio on 2,5 % + alv (3,1 %) kohteen velattomasta hinnasta, minimipalkkio 2000,00 €. Palkkio sisältää kaikki keskeiset myyntiprosessin vaiheet aina arviosta kaupantekoon.

About-Us-Section.title: Real estate brokerage with strong local expertise
About-Us-Section.paragraph: We offer reliable and professional real estate brokerage services in the North Satakunta region. We professionally broker detached houses, row houses, and holiday homes. Our strong local expertise, gained through property management work, is our advantage in ensuring successful home sales.

Introduction-Section.title: Renting made easy
Introduction-Section.paragraph1: With us as your rental agent, you don’t need to worry about paperwork or viewings. We handle photographing the apartment, check tenants’ backgrounds, and prepare legally valid rental agreements.
Introduction-Section.paragraph2: As a local operator, we know the area’s market and are always available whenever you need help. We make renting worry-free for you.

Business-Hours-Title.title: Opening hours
Business-Hours-Title.paragraph1: Our office is open on weekdays from 9:00 to 16:00, Monday to Thursday. On Fridays, we serve remotely from 9:00 to 14:30.
Business-Hours-Title.paragraph2: Check our opening hours on public holidays on our

Prefix.title: Our staff
Prefix.paragraph: Property management and housing transactions are matters of trust, and with us they are always handled by real people. Meet our team, ready to help you with all aspects of housing.

Aki-Rajahalme.Title: CEO, property management, real estate brokerage

Salla-Ahonen.Title: Property management, rental brokerage, real estate brokerage

Prefix.title: Send us a message
Prefix.paragraph: We are happy to help with all matters related to property management, rentals, and real estate brokerage. Send us a message using the form, and we’ll take care of it. You can also contact us by phone or by visiting our office in person.

Prefix.title: Rent out your property easily and safely
Prefix.paragraph1: Fill in the form below and send us the details of the property you want to rent out – we’ll take care of the rest. We handle the property presentation, finding a suitable tenant, preparing the rental agreement, and carrying out the necessary checks.
Prefix.paragraph2: Our service is suitable for private landlords as well as housing companies and organizations. When you want to rent out your property quickly and reliably, you’re in the right place.

Prefix.title: Interested in a rental apartment?
Prefix.paragraph1: Submit a rental application to us using this form! We will contact you after the form has been submitted, for example regarding possible apartment viewings.
Prefix.paragraph2: Fill in the application carefully with your own and other applicants' information, as well as your preferences for the apartment, such as location, size, and desired start date of the tenancy. The more accurately you fill in the application, the better we can help you find a new home.
Prefix.paragraph3: All information in the application will be handled confidentially, and personal data will be processed in accordance with data protection legislation and rental mediation regulations.

Property-Options.title: Which rental property are you applying for?
Property-Options.Search-Placeholder: Search by address, square meters, or rent

Education-Background.Start-Year: What year did you start your degree:

Employment.Work-Start-Date: When did / will the employment start:

Other-Applicants.prefix: Are you applying for a rental home for yourself, or are you planning to move into a new home with someone else? If yes, you can add other applicants' details by clicking the “Add new applicant” button below. Information about children does not need to be filled in; you can mention them in the “Other information” section at the end of the form.

Other-Information.title: Other information
Other-Information.prefix: You can write here, for example, about children moving into the apartment or pets. You may also include any preferences or questions about the property.

Application-Start-Date.Radio-button-Label:: I am applying for an apartment

Form-Labels.TOS: I give permission to check my credit information and to share the information with the landlord. Personal data is processed in accordance with the Personal Data Act (523/1999) and legislation concerning rental mediation (1075/2000).

Application-CTA-Section.title: Want to see the property?
Application-CTA-Section.paragraph: Let's arrange showings! First, fill out the rental application and we'll get back to you.

CTA-Section.title: Do you have any questions about the property?
CTA-Section.paragraph: Contact us! You can send us a message directly via email or the contact form.

Moving-Notice-Page.Banner-Title: Moving notice to the property manager

Prefix-Section.title: Send the notice, we will take care of the rest
Prefix-Section.paragraph1: Fill out the moving notice form when you move into the housing company, within the housing company, or out of the apartment. Based on the notice, property management can update resident and building register information, for example door and resident board name details.
Prefix-Section.paragraph2: The form asks for the mover's details, details of people moving with you, and the old and new address as accurately as possible. Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required.

Moving-Date-Radio-Labels.Moving-In-Radio: I am moving into the apartment
Moving-Date-Radio-Labels.Moving-Out-Radio: I am moving out of the apartment
Moving-Date-Radio-Labels.Moving-Inside-Radio: I am moving within the housing company

New-Address.title: New Address / Where are you moving?

Other-Movers.title: Other people moving with you
Other-Movers.Additional-Movers-Header: Details of the other people moving with you
Other-Movers.Children-Movers-Header: Details of children moving with you
Other-Movers.Spouse-Radio-Label: Are you moving with more than one person?
Other-Movers.Kids-Radio-Label: Are you moving with your children?

Form-Labels.TOS: I confirm that the information I have provided is correct and I consent to the processing of my personal data for updating the housing company’s resident and building registers and related property management purposes, in accordance with applicable data protection legislation.

Prefix-Section.title: Submit water and electricity readings
Prefix-Section.paragraph1: With this form, you can submit the cold water, hot water and electricity readings for your apartment to the property management company. Please fill in your contact details as well as the housing company and apartment information carefully so that the readings can be assigned correctly.
Prefix-Section.paragraph2: Enter the reading date and only provide the readings that apply to your apartment. You can add additional details in the additional information field. Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required.

Reading-Types.title: Report type
Reading-Types.Checkbox-Label: Select the reading types you want to report:

More-Information-TextArea.title: Additional information about the readings
More-Information-TextArea.label: Write here any additional information that may help with processing the readings. For example, you can mention the location of the meter, unusual readings, move-in or move-out date, billing-related details, or whether you are only reporting some of the readings.

Consumption-Readings-Form-Page.TOS: I certify that the information I have provided is correct and consent to the processing of the information for the purpose of allocating consumption readings, invoicing, and related property management in accordance with applicable data protection legislation.

Prefix-Section.title: Order House Register Extract
Prefix-Section.paragraph1: With this form you can order a house register extract for a housing association managed by AR Isännöinni. Please fill in the requested information carefully so that the order can be processed as smoothly as possible. The house register extract can be sent electronically to the email address you provided or picked up as a physical document from our office during opening hours. Please note that fields marked with an asterisk (*) are mandatory.

Apartment-Information.title: Apartment information from the house registry extract

Delivery-Method.title: Document delivery method
Delivery-Method.Radio-Button-Label: How would you like us to deliver the document?
Delivery-Method.For-Pickup: I will pick up the document from the office

House-Register-Extract-Form-Page.TOS: I certify that the information I have provided is correct and I agree to my consent to the processing of my personal data for the purpose of providing a house registry extract and related hosting in accordance with applicable data protection legislation.

Prefix-Section.title: Request for maintenance companies
Prefix-Section.paragraph1: Submit a maintenance request using the form below when you notice a fault in the housing company’s premises or in an apartment that requires repair. Please provide the name or address of the housing company, the apartment details, your contact information, and as detailed a description of the issue as possible. You may also attach photos to the request to help clarify the matter.
Prefix-Section.paragraph2: Please also indicate whether a master key may be used when carrying out the repair work and whether you would like to be contacted before the repair work begins. Required fields are marked with an asterisk (*).

Maintenance-Description.title: Description of the Fault
Maintenance-Description.Maintenance-Description-Label: Describe the fault you have noticed:
Maintenance-Description.Attachments-Label: Attachments related to the fault (Allowed file formats: .PNG, .JPG):

Other-Information.title: Other Information
Other-Information.Master-Key: May a master key be used when carrying out the repair work?
Other-Information.House-Pets: Are there pets in the apartment?
Other-Information.Text-Area-Label: You can write any other relevant information here, such as the location of security locks or the best time to access the apartment:

Form-Labels.TOS: I confirm that the information I have provided is correct and give my consent to the processing of my personal data for the purpose of delivering the maintenance request and related property management services in accordance with applicable data protection legislation.

Prefix-Section.title: Notice of Alteration and Renovation Work in an Apartment
Prefix-Section.paragraph1: With this form, a shareholder can notify the housing company of planned alteration and renovation work in an apartment before the work begins. Please provide your contact details, the apartment where the work will be carried out, a description of the planned work, the contractors carrying out the work, and the estimated schedule.
Prefix-Section.paragraph2: Please attach the required plans, drawings, and any other additional information to the notice. A construction industry professional must be appointed as the supervisor for the alteration work. The supervisor will submit a report, including photographs, to the housing company after the work has been completed. Please note that supervision does not remove the responsibility of the shareholder or the contractor for the proper execution of the work.
Prefix-Section.paragraph3: If the renovation or alteration work is carried out in shareholder-controlled premises built in 1994 or earlier, the asbestos survey required by law must be completed before the work begins. Required fields are marked with an asterisk (*).

Renovation-Type-Checkboxes.title: Type of Renovation or Alteration Work
Renovation-Type-Checkboxes.Checkbox-Label: What type of renovation or alteration work is involved?

Renovation-Information.Construction-Work-title: Information on the Contractor Carrying Out the Construction Work
Renovation-Information.Electrical-Work-title: Information on the Contractor Carrying Out the Electrical Work
Renovation-Information.LVI-Work-title: Information on the Contractor Carrying Out the HVAC and Plumbing Work

Renovation-Supervisor.title: Supervisor of the Renovation and Alteration Work
Renovation-Supervisor.prefix-paragraph: Renovation and alteration work requires the appointment of a supervisor, who will submit a report on the alteration work, including photographs in PDF format, to the housing company after the work has been completed.
Renovation-Supervisor.Construction-Work-Supervisor-Radio-Label: Will the same contact person who carries out the construction work also act as the supervisor of the construction work?
Renovation-Supervisor.Electrical-Work-Supervisor-Radio-Label: Will the same contact person who carries out the electrical work also act as the supervisor of the electrical work?
Renovation-Supervisor.LVI-Work-Supervisor-Radio-Label: Will the same contact person who carries out the HVAC and plumbing work also act as the supervisor of the HVAC and plumbing work?
Renovation-Supervisor.Construction-Work-title: Information on the Supervisor of the Construction Work
Renovation-Supervisor.Electrical-Work-title: Information on the Supervisor of the Electrical Work
Renovation-Supervisor.LVI-Work-title: Information on the Supervisor of the HVAC and Plumbing Work

Other-Information.title: Other Information
Other-Information.Start-Date: Start date of the alteration and renovation work:
Other-Information.End-Date: Estimated completion date of the alteration and renovation work:
Other-Information.Attachment-Files: Attachments such as plans and floor plans (Allowed file formats: .pdf, .jpg, .png)
